title: fxblanco-methods consumer capabilities
description: Each consumer repo provides a .methodik-capabilities.json at its root matching this schema. sync-consumer.sh validates it before materializing anything.

runtimes.description: One entry per runtime this consumer actually uses. A Claude-only consumer omits 'codex' entirely.

state_access.description: Required if state_backend != 'none'. Never put secret VALUES here — env var references only.

auth_env_ref.description: Name of the env var holding the secret — not the secret itself.

storage_path_pattern.description: Where captured/raw content lands, with a <domain> placeholder, e.g. "knowledge/<domain>/raw/". Required by the capture/digest/research pipeline — see skills/storage-contract.md.

inbox_path.description: Optional. Where captures without a clear topic area land. Default: storage_path_pattern with <domain> -> "_inbox" and any trailing "raw/" dropped.

knowledge_path_pattern.description: Optional. The condensed knowledge layer, with a <domain> placeholder. Default: storage_path_pattern with its trailing "raw/" replaced by "wiki/". Must be set explicitly if the raw pattern doesn't end in "raw/".

indexer_command.description: Optional. Command to regenerate the knowledge index after structural changes.

instruction_modules.description: Which methods/*.md (and optionally personal-profile) get rendered into this consumer's root instruction files.

enabled_surfaces.description: Which runtimes THIS CONSUMER actually wants skills materialized for — intersected with each artifact's own `surfaces` in manifest.json.
